products.name: PermaDur Excellent Fry Pan
products.search: wmf permadur excellent fry pan permadur excellent 24 cm 28 cm
products.description: WMF manufactures its products with a high level of quality and expertise. The WMF PermaDur Excellent Fry Pan features WMF's robust 3-layer PermaDur coating—perfect for daily use and effortless clean-up. Its thick cast aluminum construction offers exceptionally even cooking results and stands up to even the most demanding use. Compatible with all stovetops, including induction, it is equipped with the TransTherm® universal base for optimal heat distribution and retention, as well as a heat-insulated handle that provides maximum safety and comfort. The result is flawless, reliable cooking—from flash-frying and lower-fat cooking to gentle and refined sautés.

On the other hand, a multilayer construction with aluminum core and Cromargan® high-quality stainless steel exterior ensures the outstanding results of a traditional uncoated pan. With a design that safely goes from stovetop to oven in an instant, and convenient features including reduced-heat handles and a wide pouring rim, this fry pan promises flawless results every time.
